user_story: As an HR admin, I want to indicate whether my organization supports exit management, so that the exit module is enabled or disabled accordingly.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Management screen; When I set "Does your organization support exit management?" to Yes and save; Then exit management is enabled for the organization

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of configured exit types with their type and employee-class-specific flag, so that I can review the available exit reasons.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Management screen; When the page loads; Then I see a list showing exit name, exit type and employee class specific

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new exit type, so that I can capture all the ways an employee may leave the organization.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Management screen; When I click Add new exit type and provide the exit name and type; Then the new exit type is saved and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing exit type, so that I can keep exit definitions accurate.
acceptance_criteria: Given an exit type exists in the list; When I click Edit and update its details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and move to the next configuration step, so that I can complete the exit setup in sequence.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured exit management; When I click Save & Next; Then my changes are saved and I advance to the next step
